ingredients: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives (chicken 6%), cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, oils and fats, minerals, fruit, seeds, vegetables. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 17.8mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 0.6mg, 3b405 (Copper) 2.9mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 3.9mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 45.9mg.
